examples: I got treated as if I was a bit brainless.
Because I follow a classic pattern, the coding is almost brainless.
He suggests that all of this talk lately about "brainless" teens could possibly be an attempt to take away attention from reality.
Greedy authors, greedy agents, brainless book chains with their Vivaldi-riddle espresso bars, publishers owned by metallurgy conglomerates, operated by glacially cold bean-counters in Geneva.
My immobility was complete, as if tendrils of myself had burrowed down and sought root in the soil of Japan, rendering me brainless vegetation.
